title: Circumstances Considered in Determining Penalties for Erring Recruitment Agencies, Foreign Employers, and Workers
content:
In the determination of the penalties to be imposed on erring recruitment agencies, foreign employers, and workers, the following mitigating, aggravating, and alternative circumstances attendant to the commission of the offense shall be considered:

1. First Offender
2. Admission of guilt and voluntary restitution, where applicable
3. Good faith
4. Exemplary performance
5. Recidivism
6. Prejudice to the worker
7. Gross negligence
8. Other analogous circumstances

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
